extraction.one_line_summary: GROVES Kaden won a crash-marred sprint after rainy conditions slowed the peloton to mid-30s km/h average speed and eliminated several contenders in late crashes.
tactical_patterns: Break allowed zero threat despite horror conditions—peloton kept gap at 1 minute even riding mid-30s average, suggesting sprint teams calculated pace control.
Late-race crashes at 7km and sub-3km show GC teams failed to position leaders safely despite obvious danger from slow racing pace.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: hit deck twice (dog-caused crash mid-race, another sub-3km) revealing poor positioning luck or team shelter failure in dangerous conditions
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: caught in 7km crash but recovered to peloton, demonstrating superior bike handling or team recovery protocol
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: back wheel slipped on white line in final 300m then crashed across line, suggesting age/handling limitations in wet technical finishes
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: neutral: took KOM points from break then soft-pedaled back, reveals mountains jersey hunting without GC ambition
